markdown:
# Ring of Regeneration

While wearing this ring, you regain 1d6 [[hit_points Points]] every 10 minutes if you have at least 1 [[hit_points Point]]. If you lose a body part, the ring causes the missing part to regrow and return to full functionality after 1d6 + 1 days if you have at least 1 [[hit_points Point]] the whole time.
